description:
Goal: consume the generalized delivery contract from compiler2 native terminator emission so resumed receive paths, native returns, and native tailcalls stop improvising ABI compatibility locally.

Output contract:
- emit_return_term, emit_call_term, and emit_native_tail_call consume one delivery plan
- resumed selective-receive outcome closures and other continuations re-enter through the same authoritative boundary logic
- repr mismatches are handled by generated adapters or rejected by construction, not by call-site-specific fixes

Changes:
- refactor native terminator emission to ask the surface/driver for delivery plans
- route resumed receive continuation delivery through the same path
- remove ad hoc callee/caller repr mismatch handling that becomes obsolete
- recover compiler2 native selective receive over make_ref identities and minimal receive->arithmetic repros

Validation:
- fz2 native repros pass
- receive_selective_refs passes again
- workspace compiler2 native selective-receive coverage stays green
title: Route compiler2 native return/resume/tailcall through one delivery planner
